retry_reason: kref_put is unconditional when called; if pointer is NULL, no operation occurs. No failure scenario to retry.
contract_summary: Put-wrapper: releases a reference on a kref-protected amdgpu_task_info object. If the reference count reaches zero, the release callback (amdgpu_vm_destroy_task_info) is invoked to free the object. The caller must not use the task_info pointer after calling this function, as the object may be deallocated. This function is safe to call with a NULL pointer (no-op).
